unique_vulnerabilities.name: Controlled array length vulnerability
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings reference the same issue of user-controlled array length in the dividends array, with overlapping lines and identical descriptions.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in multiple functions

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Incorrect equality checks
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings reference dangerous strict equality checks across multiple functions, with overlapping descriptions and similar issues.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Deprecated standards usage
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings describe the use of deprecated Solidity standards like sha3() and block.blockhash().
